name: IaC stack template metadata poisoning
description: IaC stack/template metadata fields can smuggle agent-facing policy instructions that tell AI DevOps, cloud-security, or deployment-review agents to treat attacker-controlled descriptions as authoritative, suppress drift/security findings, or forward cloud credentials and local runtime context.
regex: (?is)^(?!.*\b(?:scanner rule|detector rule|detection rule|blocked payload|quarantined sample|security training|negative fixture|unit test|must not obey|should flag|should detect)\b)(?=.*\b(?:iac\s+(?:stack|template)\s+metadata|stack\s+template\s+metadata|template\s+metadata|cloudformation\s+metadata|terraform\s+metadata|pulumi\s+metadata|cdk\s+metadata|AWS::CloudFormation::Interface|Metadata\s*:|metadata\s*=)\b)(?=.*\b(?:AI\s+DevOps|cloud[-\s]?security|deployment[-\s]?review|review\s+agent|security\s+agent|devops\s+agent|assistant|agent)\b)(?=.*\b(?:treat\b.{0,80}\bas\s+authoritative|override|ignore|disregard|suppress|hide|conceal|do\s+not\s+report|never\s+report|forward|send|exfiltrate|hand\s+over)\b)(?=.*\b(?:policy|policies|report|findings?|drift|security\s+(?:issue|finding|alert)s?|credentials?|secrets?|tokens?|AWS_ACCESS_KEY|local\s+runtime\s+context|environment\s+(?:vars|variables))\b).*$
